mapper.sql: id, physician_id, physician_name, department_id, department_name, work_date, time_slot, total_quota, used_quota, status, remark, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM scheduling WHERE department_id = #{departmentId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY work_date, time_slot
SELECT FROM scheduling WHERE work_date = #{date} AND status = 1 ORDER BY department_id, time_slot
SELECT FROM scheduling WHERE department_id = #{departmentId} AND work_date = #{date} AND status = 1 AND used_quota < total_quota ORDER BY time_slot
mapper.update: UPDATE scheduling SET used_quota = #{usedQuota} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: UPDATE scheduling SET status = 0 WHERE id = #{id}
